exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Up 5 lb from last session. Controlled tempo — no locking at top. Drive through both heels evenly.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Up 5 lb. Full hip extension at top — hard squeeze, no hyperextension. Chin tucked.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: Up 5 lb from 40. Hinge from hips, soft knee bend. Feel the stretch in the hamstrings — stop before lower back rounds.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: Up 5 lb. Cap at 10 reps per set — don't grind through tightness. Smooth and controlled on the way back up.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: Swapping goblet squat for variety. Front shin stays vertical, drive through front heel.

exercises.name: Core Circuit A
exercises.detail: Dead Bugs × 8/side + Side Plank 25s/side + Hollow Body Hold 20s · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Dead bugs: lower back flat the entire time. Side plank: hips stacked. Hollow body: arms overhead, ribs down.

week.note: Done ✓ — Flat bench 65lb, Cable row 12 on set 3
